calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Co-Trustee And For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vivian Redsar for (Petitioner) Joel Faden.

Ms. Redsar provided the court with background information regarding the motion to seal which had been denied, stated that they are modifying their request, that they are now requesting that only the addresses of the beneficiaries be redacted, that the beneficiary list and the service list in the other case do not overlap and that they have made some additional changes to the proposed order which she will send in. The Petition for Appointment of Co-Trustee and for Modification of trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Murillo. (Not Reported)
